gxio_trio_context_t Struct Reference
[TRIO Device API (gxio/trio.h)]

A context object used to manage TRIO hardware resources. More...


Data Fields

int fd
 File descriptor for calling up to Linux (and thus the HV).
char * mmio_base_mac
 The VA at which the MAC MMIO registers are mapped.
uint32_t pio_offsets [TRIO_NUM_TPIO_REGIONS]
 File offsets for PIO regions, to compensate for hardware's 4GB-aligned-region requirement.
void * push_dma_vas [TRIO_NUM_PUSH_DMA_RINGS]
 VAs to which the push DMA post regions have been mapped.
void * pull_dma_vas [TRIO_NUM_PULL_DMA_RINGS]
 VAs to which the pull DMA post regions have been mapped.
void * scatter_queue_vas [TRIO_NUM_MAP_SQ_REGIONS]
 VAs to which the scatter queues have been mapped.

Detailed Description

A context object used to manage TRIO hardware resources.

Examples:

trio/gxpci_c2c/c2c_send.c, trio/gxpci_host_nic/gxpci_echo_drv_module.c, trio/gxpci_host_pq/host.c, trio/gxpci_mmi/mmi.c, and trio/push_dma/app.c.

Field Documentation

int gxio_trio_context_t::fd

File descriptor for calling up to Linux (and thus the HV).

char* gxio_trio_context_t::mmio_base_mac

The VA at which the MAC MMIO registers are mapped.

uint32_t gxio_trio_context_t::pio_offsets[TRIO_NUM_TPIO_REGIONS]

File offsets for PIO regions, to compensate for hardware's 4GB-aligned-region requirement.

void* gxio_trio_context_t::push_dma_vas[TRIO_NUM_PUSH_DMA_RINGS]

VAs to which the push DMA post regions have been mapped.

void* gxio_trio_context_t::pull_dma_vas[TRIO_NUM_PULL_DMA_RINGS]

VAs to which the pull DMA post regions have been mapped.

void* gxio_trio_context_t::scatter_queue_vas[TRIO_NUM_MAP_SQ_REGIONS]

VAs to which the scatter queues have been mapped.
